description: One archive-key builder sorts tags for content-addressed keys; four sibling builders do not.
inspired_by: Content-addressed storage keys requiring canonical segment order

findings.rationale: buildArchiveKey sorts tag segments while its four sibling builders (user/order/event/session) do not. The sort makes archive keys content-addressed so the same record cannot be stored twice under different tag orders. This case checks the detector still isolates a single divergent function within a larger sibling group.
